| PBI-1 | Business Owner | As a business decision-maker, I want a professional website that presents AI engineering services and their business value so that I can confidently book a strategy call. | InReview | 1. A single-page Jekyll site is available on GitHub Pages. 2. The site lists popular AI engineering services and clearly states business benefits. 3. A Calendly booking CTA is embedded with placeholder URL. 4. Layout is responsive for desktop and mobile. 5. Site is ready to transition to a custom domain later. [View Details](./1/prd.md) |
